Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Information about a custom generated business website lead

slug.description: The URL slug identifier for this lead's demo page

business_name.description: The company name of the business

category.description: The industry category (e.g. Restaurant, Hotel, Salon, etc.)

owner_name.description: The primary owner or contact name

address.description: The physical address of the business

phone.description: The primary contact voice/SMS phone number

viewed.description: Whether this lead has been viewed from admin

viewed_at.description: ISO timestamp when the lead was first viewed

time_on_page.description: Total seconds spent interacting with the preview

converted.description: Whether the user clicked dynamic CTAs or was manually converted

whatsapp_pinged.description: Whether the CallMeBot API was notified

generated_demo.description: Whether the demo showcase was built

viewed_demo.description: Whether the lead visited their live demo page

clicked_whatsapp.description: Whether the lead clicked the live WhatsApp dynamic link

viewed_pricing.description: Whether the lead visited the custom pricing dialog

/leads/{leadId}.description: Leads directory for InstaDemoX website builder
